videoJson.name: EIAJ-1
videoJson.fact1: This was the  first widely  used non- professional  format due to  its low cost and  portability
videoJson.fact2: This was the  first video tape  format to fit  into a recording  device small  enough to be  transported  by one person  (known as the  PortaPak)
videoJson.fact3: This format's success can be  attributed to it having been  developed as a  shared, non- proprietary  standardized  format that  could be  developed and  manufactured  by different companies
